wikis.description: Easily measure your energy rates. A wiki about the usage of the mod.

wikis.name: LootJS
wikis.description: A KubeJS add-on for loot modification. Create, remove and modify loot tables, or add dynamic modifiers.

wikis.description: A KubeJS add-on extending the base functionality of KubeJS. Includes features such as trade and potion brewing modifications.

wikis.name: Summoning Rituals
wikis.description: Create custom Summoning Rituals for a custom modpack progression experience.
